reviews.review_description: I have tried uninstalling this app 4 times aswell as removing the backup from the cloud and a minute later I get a notification saying that the game is finished installing every time and so it goes back into my game library. This is strange because I have uninstalled many games on my meta quest and this is the only game to have this issue.

reviews.review_title: Takes Cooking Shows to the Next Level!
reviews.review_description: Even though it’s just one episode so far, the quality is stellar. It’s like stepping into a cooking show and learning with the chefs. Loved learning about Japanese food culture as well. Can’t wait for more!
You watch a video and make the salmon sushy.
Great first lesson showing step by step instructions to make learning to cook fun and helping build muscle memory. Looking forward to the next modules!
